nasb.text: All its fat he shall offer up in smoke on the altar as in the case of the fat of the sacrifice of peace offerings. Thus the priest shall make atonement for him in regard to his sin, and he will be forgiven.

esv.text: And all its fat he shall burn on the altar, like the fat of the sacrifice of peace offerings. So the priest shall make atonement for him for his sin, and he shall be forgiven.

cnv.text: 公羊所有的脂肪，都要焚燒在祭壇上，好像平安祭的脂肪一樣；祭司為他贖了罪，他就蒙赦免。

ccb.text: 要像焚烧平安祭牲的脂肪一样，把羊的所有脂肪都放在坛上焚烧。这样，祭司为他赎了罪，他就会得到赦免。
